code:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant Upstream
    participant agent-client-relationships
    participant agent-fi-relationship
    participant Database
    participant enrolment-store-proxy

    Upstream->>+agent-client-relationships: POST /agent/:arn/remove-authorisation
    alt PIR Service
        agent-client-relationships->>+agent-fi-relationship: DELETE /agent-fi-relationship/relationships/agent/:arn/service/:service/client/:clientId
        agent-fi-relationship-->>-agent-client-relationships: Response
    end
    alt Alt-ITSA Service
        agent-client-relationships->>Database: Delete: Remove the partial-auth record.
    end
    agent-client-relationships->>Database: Update: Find the original invitation and mark it as relationship ended.
    alt Default Services
        agent-client-relationships->>+enrolment-store-proxy: DELETE /enrolment-store-proxy/enrolment-store/groups/:groupId/enrolments/:enrolmentKey
        enrolment-store-proxy-->>-agent-client-relationships: Response
    end
    agent-client-relationships-->>-Upstream: Final Response

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个上游系统调用agent-client-relationships来移除授权的流程。主入口是POST /agent/:arn/remove-authorisation，然后要根据不同的服务类型走不同的分支。
明白，我看到有两个主要的服务分支：PIR Service和Alt-ITSA Service。PIR这边是要调用agent-fi-relationship服务做删除对吗？
对的，PIR分支是同步调用agent-fi-relationship，路径是DELETE /agent-fi-relationship/relationships/agent/:arn/service/:service/client/:clientId，然后等它返回响应。Alt-ITSA分支则不同，是直接操作Database删除partial-auth记录。
好的，我把这两个alt分支都加上了。接下来我看到还有一个共同步骤：不管走哪个分支，最后都要更新Database，找到原始invitation并标记为relationship ended。
没错，这是关键的一步。然后还有第三个alt分支叫Default Services，这里要调用enrolment-store-proxy，删除enrolment-store里对应groupId和enrolmentKey的记录。
确认一下，enrolment-store-proxy这个调用是同步的，需要等待响应回来，对吗？还有最后返回给Upstream的Final Response是在所有操作完成后？
是的，enrolment-store-proxy是同步调用，等Response回来。Final Response是在整个流程走完之后返回给Upstream。另外别忘了给所有消息加上autonumber，方便追踪步骤。
完成了。我检查一遍：Upstream发起POST到agent-client-relationships，然后分三个alt场景处理PIR、Alt-ITSA和Default Services，中间统一更新invitation状态，最后返回Final Response给Upstream。
